title: Better Biscuits
description: Honey cake, or would you prefer a sweet berry cookie?
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/IQlTKOh.jpg)
### 📖 About:
This mod adds new pastries like apple pies and various cakes.
From the cakes you can make smaller pieces of cake.
Especially good for roleplay servers or for a sugarsweet change in the game

### ✅ Features:

About 10 new cookies, cakes and other pastries
Apple strudel, butter cookies, chocolate cookies, double cookies, sweet berry cookies, poppy seed pastry, cinnamon stars, speculoos cookies
Cheese cake, honey cake, chocolate cake, carrot cake, berry dessert
 
### 🎄 Next Update:

Currently no updates planned
### ❓ F.A.Q. 

**Can i eat this?**\
As long as you do not have dairy and wheat intolerance, why not...
